ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each postal code */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the postal code is located */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood where the postal code is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the postal code */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the postal code */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the postal code was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the postal code information was last updated */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Geometric shape of the postal code area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("postal_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the borough in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Geometric shape of the borough area */,
  "councilor_name" TEXT /* Name of the councilor representing the borough */,
  "councilor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the councilor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the neighborhood in square kilometers */,
  "shape" TEXT /* Geometric shape of the neighborhood area */,
  "history" TEXT /* Brief history of the neighborhood */,
  "points_of_interest" TEXT /* Notable points of interest in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density in the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the neighborhood */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level in the neighborhood */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the population in the neighborhood */,
  "ethnic_diversity" TEXT /* Ethnic diversity of the neighborhood */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Income distribution of the population in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of infrastructure (e.g., parks, schools, hospitals) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of infrastructure in the neighborhood */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the infrastructure */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the infrastructure */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the infrastructure */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source for the infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., public transportation, healthcare, education) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the service */,
  "service_hours" TEXT /* Hours of operation for the service */,
  "service_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_provider FOREIGN KEY ("provider") REFERENCES service_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the service provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone for the service provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of service provider (e.g., non-profit, government, private) */,
  "provider_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the service provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service */,
  "status" TEXT /* Availability status of the service in the neighborhood */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the availability status was last updated */,
  "availability_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of availability for the service */,
  "availability_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the availability of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_availability_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_availability_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the postal code being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access used by the user (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "access_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_postal_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("postal_code_id") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postal_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "postal_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the postal code for which the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, infrastructure, services) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_report_type FOREIGN KEY ("report_type") REFERENCES report_types ("report_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_postal_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("postal_code_id") REFERENCES postal_codes ("postal_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report type */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report type (e.g., demographic, infrastructure, services) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_category" TEXT /* Category of the role (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "role_permission_category" TEXT /* Category of the role permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "user_role_category" TEXT /* Category of the user role (e.g., admin, user, guest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
